rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0010
rows.name: Goodness, what a magnificent system.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0020
rows.name:
Linking the Ares's power source to the White Whale
2 must have been a monumental task in itself,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0030
rows.name: but to modularize it[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0040
rows.name:
to allow the Ares to operate
normally as before[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0050
rows.name: I am truly impressed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0060
rows.name: We take the cores back from Void,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0065
rows.name: return here with the complete Ares,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0070
rows.name:
and our escape from this
world becomes a reality.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0080
rows.name:
Truly simple, a final mission
perfectly suited for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0090
rows.name:
To complete something of this
magnitude in such a short time[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0100
rows.name: It's amazing![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0110
rows.name:
It is all thanks to the wisdom of our allies who
share our goal, with the Ma-non at the center.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0120
rows.name:
Earthlings alone could
never have achieved this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0130
rows.name:
It looks like we've got a pretty
clear shot at winning this![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0140
rows.name: The contest for survival[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0150
rows.name: I see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0160
rows.name: [ST:wide ]―Lin.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0170
rows.name: I understand how you feel, but[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0180
rows.name: A-ah, I'm sorry.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0200
rows.name: I didn't mean to bring it all back up[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0210
rows.name: Lin-san's hesitation is entirely justified.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0220
rows.name: In a perfect world[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0230
rows.name: Every living being, without fighting,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0240
rows.name:
should join hands and aim for
a new universe together.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0250
rows.name: However, when we actually faced him,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0260
rows.name:
at the very least, he
harbored no such thoughts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0270
rows.name: He is entirely unaware of the concept itself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0280
rows.name:
All he desires is to survive,
even if he is the only one left[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0290
rows.name: That is all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0300
rows.name: It is quite a lonely existence[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0310
rows.name: Because he only knows solitude,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0320
rows.name:
he doesn't want to bring anyone else
into the new world he's aiming for.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0330
rows.name: Is that why he denies us...?[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0340
rows.name: That's exactly right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0350
rows.name: Hold on.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0360
rows.name:
That guy attacked us claiming
he wanted to understand death.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0370
rows.name:
Was my perception of him as
fundamentally evil mistaken?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0380
rows.name: No, that is also a facet of who he is.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0390
rows.name: He is an isolated and greedy seeker of truth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0400
rows.name: In a certain sense, he is pure, but[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0410
rows.name: Since his purity brings harm to us,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0415
rows.name: it could indeed be called evil.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0420
rows.name: Regardless,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0430
rows.name:
it remains a will that is
difficult to comprehend.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0440
rows.name: The guy doesn't desire comprehension.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0450
rows.name:
He's solitary, and he doesn't
need anyone else, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0460
rows.name:
He probably considers
comprehension to be an insult.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0470
rows.name: Well, though[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0480
rows.name:
he probably doesn't even possess the
capacity to feel anger over it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0490
rows.name: You really understand him[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0495
rows.name: quite well, don't you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0500
rows.name: Stop it. It gives me the creeps.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0510
rows.name:
Our consciousnesses might have gotten
mixed together without me noticing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0520
rows.name: On that side[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0530
rows.name: While we were in the rift between worlds.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0540
rows.name: Mixed?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0550
rows.name: That is a fascinating perspective.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0560
rows.name: It's a place where all consciousness flows.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0570
rows.name: Both me and Void returned from there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0580
rows.name:
It wouldn't be strange if
some kind of bug occurred.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0590
rows.name:
Are you saying your
consciousnesses are shared?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0600
rows.name: Who knows.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0610
rows.name: [ST:wide ]―However,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0620
rows.name:
there is one decisive
difference between me and him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0630
rows.name:
I am fighting to protect this place where
I belong, together with all of you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0640
rows.name:
That comes from an intense emotion
that Void absolutely cannot possess.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0650
rows.name: You could even call it love.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0660
rows.name: Those are truly the words of a hero.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0670
rows.name:
It is what the proverb calls "a
smooth talker and a capable worker."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0680
rows.name: Ahahaha![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0690
rows.name:
And here I thought I'd
finally shaken that off.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0700
rows.name: I'm expecting great things from you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0710
rows.name: In the end, what dictates fate is human will.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0720
rows.name:
Whether you're flesh and blood
or a [System:Ruby rt=Blue Blood ]Ｂ．Ｂ．[/System:Ruby], it doesn't matter.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0730
rows.name: As beings with emotions,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0735
rows.name: we fight in order to live.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0740
rows.name: [ST:wide ]―Right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0750
rows.name: With this, the White Whale 2 is complete.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0760
rows.name:
And the relocation of those wishing
to migrate to NLA is also finished.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0770
rows.name: The plan is finally entering its last stage.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0780
rows.name:
Get the residents on the ship, take
back the cores from Void, and jump.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0790
rows.name: That's it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0800
rows.name: I know you're all tired, but[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0810
rows.name: we're almost there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0820
rows.name: Lend me your strength just a little longer.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0830
rows.name:
We still have some time before the
disappearance phenomenon reaches us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0840
rows.name: It's hard to relax, but please get some rest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0850
rows.name: That's all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32350100_MSG0860
rows.name: Dismissed.[ST:wait ]
